---
title: "About Me"
sidebar: false 
---

# Education

-   B.S., Industrial Engineering, Hacettepe University, Turkey, 2022 - ongoing.

# Work Experience

## Employements

1.  Not yet

2.  Not yet

## Internships

1.  I hope good firm

2.  I hope better firm

# Projects

# Competencies

R, Quarto, Git, Python

# Hobbies

Playing chess and guitar.

# RESUME
